verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can only imagine What it will be like When I walk By Your side I can only imagine What my eyes will see When Your face Is before me I can only imagine I can only imagine

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Surrounded by Your glory What will my heart feel Will I dance for You Jesus Or in awe of You be still Will I stand in Your presence Or to my knees will I fall Will I sing hallelujah, Will I be able to speak at all I can only imagine I can only imagine

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can only imagine When that day comes And I find myself Standing in the Son I can only imagine When all I will do Is forever Forever worship You I can only imagine I can only imagine
